author: zhao414
description: Intelligently paste clipboard content into Canvas as nodes — single node, heading tree, list tree, or paragraphs with auto-detection. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: zhao414
manifest.description: Intelligently paste clipboard content into Canvas as nodes — single node, heading tree, list tree, or paragraphs with auto-detection.
manifest.name: Canvas Smart Paste

name: Canvas Smart Paste

releases.author: zhao414
releases.description:
## Fixed in this release

- **Multi-line LaTeX blocks not closing correctly** — When the closing `$$` was at the end of a line (e.g. `\end{vmatrix}=ad-bc$$`), the LaTeX block never exited, causing all subsequent content to be swallowed. Now `$$` anywhere on the line correctly terminates the block.
- **Subsequent content swallowed after LaTeX block** — Text after a multi-line LaTeX block is now properly split into separate paragraph nodes.

## On Lint Issues

- `createEl("h2")` → `new Setting().setHeading()` to match Obsidian best practices
- `document.createElement` → `activeDocument.createElement`
- Added `getSettingDefinitions()` for Obsidian 1.13+ settings search
- Marked un-awaited Promises with `void` in `checkCallback`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zhao414/canvas-smart-paste/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: zhao414
releases.description:
## Features

- **Single node paste** — Paste all clipboard content as one text canvas node
- **Heading tree** — Parse Markdown headings (# to ######) into a hierarchical node tree with arrow connections
- **List tree** — Parse bullet (`-`) and numbered (`1.`) lists by indentation into a hierarchical node tree
- **Smart paste** — Auto-detect: headings → heading tree, only lists → list tree, otherwise → paragraphs
- **Paragraph paste** — Split text by paragraphs into individual nodes; headings become separate parent nodes with child content next to each heading

## Settings

- **Edge direction** — Choose top→bottom or left→right connections
- **Create edges** — Toggle whether arrows are drawn between nodes
- **Keep list numbering** — Preserve or strip number prefixes for ordered lists
- **Auto-resize nodes** — Canvas nodes auto-adjust height to fit content
